programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Action thriller starring Jean-Claude Van Damme. The hunt is on in New Orleans when a tough drifter agrees to help find a missing father, only to become the target in a deadly game... (1993)

Action sequel with Sylvester Stallone. Ray Breslin is back behind bars in a Latvian cell-ebration of chaos - because rescuing billionaires' daughters is just part of his daily breakout routine. (2019)
Brutal western with Lee Van Cleef and John Phillip Law. Fifteen years after his family were massacred by bandits, a young boy is now a skilled gunslinger - and he's hell-bent on revenge...(1967)
A man is attacked and bitten by a Great White shark while training in the ocean, the rescue team winch a dehydrated woman to safety from a boat, and a spooked racehorse crushes a farmer.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Western with Randolph Scott, Edgar Buchanan and Lloyd Bridges. As tensions build between unruly cattlemen and determined homesteaders in post-Civil War Kansas, can one man keep the peace? (1946)

Western with Randolph Scott, Edgar Buchanan and Lloyd Bridges. As tensions build between unruly cattlemen and determined homesteaders in post-Civil War Kansas, can one man keep the peace? (1946)
After Clay gives lawyer and saloon owner, J. Homer Radcliffe, a bill for his taxes, he challenges Clay to collect back taxes from a group of outlaws .
While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held. However, Josh interrupts a jail break involving Carl's brother Andy.
John Cannon and Billy Blue are captured by Apaches far from home and made to face death from lack of water.
Bounty hunters are working on High Chaparral range infuriating Big John. He does allow the wounded son of one to stay which leads to a confrontation between father and son.
Tempestuous sci-fi thriller starring Esai Morales. A mysterious object crashes into Seattle, unleashing cataclysmic weather events which threaten global annihilation (2012).

The Persuaders discover a crashed plane containing a dead scientist and a formula he's written down. The Persuaders must find who the formula belongs to - and the murderer.
The Avengers latest case sees them enter the world of ceramics when industry executives are mysteriously killed. Can Steed and Peel unearth the truth? Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.
The Avengers attempt to track down criminals who have mysteriously vanished. Is the case linked to the deaths of secret agents and a Tudor mansion? Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.
Action thriller starring Dominic Cooper. A rogue Russian operative plots to unleash deadly biochemical weapons. Special Boat Service commando John Stratton is sent in to hunt him down (2017).

Action with Mark Lutz. When an asteroid threatens to obliterate Earth, a discredited astrophysicist is humanity's last hope. Armed with cutting-edge tech, can he prevent a global disaster (2015)?

Western starring Sterling Hayden. After the Civil War a rancher is wrongfully imprisoned in a notorious desert prison. When a deadly plague threatens to overwhelm the jail, can he help stop it? (1952)
A car crash leaves people trapped inside their vehicles, a bushwalker is snowed-in and trapped inside a hiker's hut, and a young man is left unconscious when he is hit by a giant wave.

Frontier drama with Stephen McNally. Trouble looms in a sun-blazed town when an exiled gambler returns to warn of an impending Apache raid. Can the residents - good and bad - stand together? (1951)

Frontier drama with Stephen McNally. Trouble looms in a sun-blazed town when an exiled gambler returns to warn of an impending Apache raid. Can the residents - good and bad - stand together? (1951)
With the mayor demanding action against outlaw Frank Masters, Clay Hollister searches the county for him .
When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.
Blue finds a job scouting for a man and adopted Apache daughter who are there on government orders to make peace with Cochise.
Blue and the men decide they can win the $300 needed for a new saddle at the Fourth of July rodeo. When only John wins, it is left to Blue filling in at a prize fight for the boxer he hurt.
Apocalyptic action with Jeff Fahey and Erika Eleniak. When a shift in Earth's polarity plunges the planet's equatorial regions into a new Ice Age, a desperate race for survival is ignited... (2006)

There's a traitor about, selling secrets from British Intelligence to foreign powers. Brett agrees to pose as the traitor, but things do not go as planned.
Steed and Peel are tasked with identifying the spy responsible for trading information about a secret missile base. Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.
The Avengers investigate the British Venusian Society, a group of amateur astronomers who are mysteriously dying one by one.
When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative joins forces with another prisoner to break free. (2018)

Conspiracy thriller with Denzel Washington and Meg Ryan. A US Army officer, despondent about a deadly mistake he made, investigates a female chopper pilot's worthiness for the Medal of Honor. (1996)
